title: Photophobia (RFF2026)
synopsis: On a cold February morning, 12-year-old Niki and his family arrive at the Kharkiv metro station to take shelter from the terrifying war raging outside. For Niki’s family, daylight is synonymous with mortal danger, and the boy is not allowed to leave the station premises, living under the constant glow of the neon lights. While aimlessly wandering around the abandoned cars and full platforms, Niki meets Vika (11), and a new world opens up to him. As their bond strengthens, the children find the courage once again to feel the sun on their faces.

synopsis_lang.en: On a cold February morning, 12-year-old Niki and his family arrive at the Kharkiv metro station to take shelter from the terrifying war raging outside. For Niki’s family, daylight is synonymous with mortal danger, and the boy is not allowed to leave the station premises, living under the constant glow of the neon lights. While aimlessly wandering around the abandoned cars and full platforms, Niki meets Vika (11), and a new world opens up to him. As their bond strengthens, the children find the courage once again to feel the sun on their faces.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
在凜冽的二月清晨，12歲的尼基與家人來到哈爾科夫地鐵站，躲避外面的戰火硝煙。對尼奇一家而言，日光意味著致命危險，因此這男孩被禁止離開地鐵站範圍，只能長時間活在冷酷的霓虹燈之下。
當尼基漫無目的地穿梭於廢棄車廂及擁擠的月台之間時，他遇上了11歲的維卡，隨即開啟了一個全新的世界。隨著兩人的情誼漸漸深厚，孩子們終於再次鼓起勇氣，重新感受陽光灑在臉上的溫度。

subtitle: Chinese,English
